tasks.title: Core Models and Abstract Interfaces Setup
tasks.description: Define the core normalized UsageEvent Pydantic model and abstract interfaces (UsageSource, LimitsSource, PricingStrategy) for the shared core package (tokemetry_core). Implement the FakeProvider test double to validate interfaces without Claude-specific assumptions.
tasks.details: Core package implemented: `models.py` includes `UsageEvent`, `DailyAggregate`, `LimitSnapshot`, `SourceFile`, `ParseResult`, `PriceRow`, and `Provenance` enum; all models are frozen Pydantic v2 with tz-aware timestamp validation and non-negative counts. `interfaces.py` defines `UsageSource`, `LimitsSource`, `PricingStrategy` ABCs plus `LimitsUnavailableError` for graceful degradation. `registry.py` implements `ProviderRegistry` with factories for sources and instances for pricing. `providers/fake.py` contains deterministic `FakeProvider` as reference implementation. Design deviations documented in `docs/architecture/core-package.md`: `parse` returns `ParseResult` (events + new_offset atomically) instead of iterator; `poll` returns list of snapshots (multi-window). Gates: 31 tests pass, coverage 99%, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean.
tasks.testStrategy: Run pytest on `packages/core` with 100% pass rate. Verify `UsageEvent` serialization/deserialization with fixtures. Confirm `FakeProvider` implements all abstract methods without errors. Check coverage >= 99% line, 99% branch. Validate ruff/mypy strict/trivy zero issues. Confirm 31 tests pass.

subtasks.title: Update task details and test strategy
subtasks.description: Update task details and test strategy to reflect implemented core package and design deviations.
subtasks.details: Incorporate implemented models (UsageEvent, DailyAggregate, LimitSnapshot, SourceFile, ParseResult, PriceRow, Provenance), interfaces (UsageSource, LimitsSource, PricingStrategy, LimitsUnavailableError), registry (ProviderRegistry), and FakeProvider. Document design deviations: parse returns ParseResult atomically, poll returns multi-window snapshots list. Update gates: 31 tests pass, coverage 99%, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify updated details match implemented package. Confirm design deviations documented in docs/architecture/core-package.md. Validate gates: 31 tests pass, coverage 99%, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean.

tasks.title: Anthropic Pricing Strategy and LiteLLM Sync
tasks.description: Implement the Anthropic pricing strategy with date-versioned per-MTok rates per provider/model, synced from LiteLLM's model_prices_and_context_window.json. Add manual override support and handle dated/undated model IDs.
tasks.details: The pricing subpackage is now implemented: `litellm.py` (pure transform of LiteLLM price db to per-MTok PriceRows, skips platform-prefixed aliases, fallback multipliers 1.25x/2x/0.1x when cache rates missing), `table.py` (PricingTable with date-versioned resolution, dated/undated model id matching both directions, apply_overrides for TOML manual overrides with field validation, UnknownModelError), and `anthropic.py` (AnthropicPricingStrategy linear dot product quantized to micro-USD, DEFAULT_ANTHROPIC_PRICE_ROWS verified snapshot). `providers/anthropic.py` registers the strategy. HTTP fetching is deliberately kept out of core - the server owns it. Docs: `docs/architecture/pricing.md`. Gates: 51 tests, 98.85% coverage, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean. Create `packages/core/tokemetry_core/pricing/anthropic.py` implementing `PricingStrategy` (or verify the existing implementation matches the spec). Fetch `model_prices_and_context_window.json` from LiteLLM via the server, parse into a date-versioned pricing table using `table.py`. Implement logic to resolve price for dated (e.g., `claude-opus-4-5-20251101`) and undated (e.g., `claude-fable-5`) model IDs using `table.py`'s matching. Add `manual_override` config in TOML to adjust prices using `table.py`'s `apply_overrides`. Compute cost using Anthropic formula: uncached input * input_price + 5m_cache * 1.25x + 1h_cache * 2x + cache_read * 0.1x + output * output_price. Add unit tests for price resolution and cost calculation.
tasks.testStrategy: Test price resolution for dated and undated models with fixtures. Verify cost calculation matches Anthropic formula. Confirm manual override updates pricing table. Run pytest with coverage >= 80%. Validate ruff/mypy strict/trivy zero issues.

subtasks.testStrategy: Run existing tests and verify DEFAULT_ANTHROPIC_PRICE_ROWS snapshot matches expected values.

Verify cost calculation matches the Anthropic formula: uncached input * input_price + 5m_cache * 1.25x + 1h_cache * 2x + cache_read * 0.1x + output * output_price. Include tests for manual override updates.

tasks.title: Claude Code JSONL Parser with Keep-Max Dedup
tasks.description: Implement the Claude Code JSONL parser (ClaudeCodeJsonlSource) to parse ~/.claude/projects/<encoded-cwd>/*.jsonl and subagent transcripts. Extract usage fields and implement keep-max deduplication by requestId.
tasks.details: Created `providers/claude_code.py` implementing `UsageSource`. discover() uses rglobs to find projects/**/*.jsonl including subagents, honoring CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR. parse() performs binary-reads from byte offset, implements keep-max dedup by requestId (largest output_tokens wins per pass), splits cache TTL into 5m/1h (short/long) with legacy fallback, aggregates server_tool_use counters into extra, skips non-assistant/synthetic/no-usage records, counts malformed lines (not silent drop), and leaves incomplete trailing line unconsumed. bootstrap() imports stats-cache.json dailyModelTokens as DailyAggregate. Added DailyAggregate.total_tokens with validate_default derivation and ParseResult.malformed_lines to core models. Registered usage source in providers/anthropic.py. VERIFIED against real local data: 525 transcripts, 12571 dedup events, 0 malformed, dated+undated model ids, 108 bootstrap aggregates. Gates: 67 tests, 95.31% coverage, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean.
tasks.testStrategy: Test parsing with fixtures from multiple Claude Code versions. Verify keep-max deduplication by requestId with regression tests. Confirm extraction of all required fields. Run pytest with coverage >= 80% (actual: 95.31%). Validate ruff/mypy strict/trivy zero issues (actual: clean).

tasks.title: Database Schema and Alembic Migrations
tasks.description: Define the Postgres database schema using SQLAlchemy 2 and Alembic migrations. Create tables: machines, usage_events, limit_snapshots, sessions, daily_rollups, pricing, alert_rules, alert_events, api_tokens.
tasks.details: Server DB layer implemented: `apps/server/tokemetry_server/db/config.py` (pydantic-settings, TOKEMETRY_ prefix, sync_database_url derivation asyncpg->psycopg / aiosqlite->sqlite for Alembic), `db/base.py` (DeclarativeBase with naming convention, JSONType JSONB-on-postgres variant), `db/models.py` (9 SQLAlchemy 2 Mapped models: machines, usage_events PK(provider,event_id), limit_snapshots, sessions, daily_rollups unique grain with '' sentinels, pricing unique(provider,model,date), alert_rules, alert_events FK, api_tokens; BigInteger tokens, Numeric(20,10) money, DateTime tz-aware), `db/session.py` (async engine+session_scope). Alembic configured: `alembic.ini`, `env.py` (sync migrations), hand-authored `0001_initial_schema`, `db/migrate.py` (upgrade/downgrade helpers). Cross-dialect: runs on SQLite for dev/tests, Postgres in prod. Docs: `docs/architecture/database.md`. Gates: 75 tests, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean.
tasks.testStrategy: Run Alembic upgrade/downgrade tests. Verify table creation with pytest. Check schema matches PRD requirements. Validate ruff/mypy strict/trivy zero issues. Ensure coverage >= 75%. Verify config translation and database URL derivation. Confirm ORM/schema drift check passes.

tasks.title: Idempotent Ingest Endpoints with Validation
tasks.description: Implement idempotent ingest endpoints (POST /api/v1/ingest/events, /ingest/limits, /ingest/bootstrap) with batch all-or-nothing logic, upsert keeping maximum-usage row per event_id, and sanity validation rejecting garbage.
tasks.details: The ingest layer is already implemented. Update `apps/server/tokemetry_server/api/ingest.py` to integrate with the existing FastAPI app factory (app.py) where lifespan runs Alembic upgrade and wires engine/session_factory/dialect/cost_fn on app.state. Ensure injectable cost_fn defaults to no-op per task split. Wire models in `api/schemas.py` (EventsIngest/LimitsIngest/BootstrapIngest) with to_core converters, extra=forbid, and batch size bounds. Integrate bearer auth from `api/auth.py` (bootstrap token constant-time + hashed api_tokens lookup refreshing last_used). Use `api/deps.py` for session + ingest service deps. The 3 idempotent routes in `api/ingest.py` should return 400 on validation errors and 422 on schema errors. In `services/ingest.py`, ensure dedup keeps max usage before upsert, includes machine touch, handles events keep-max upsert, limits append, and bootstrap rollup upsert. Use `services/validation.py` for viberank-style sanity checks (token max 10B, clock skew 2h). Implement dialect-aware ON CONFLICT keep-max in `db/upsert.py` for PostgreSQL+SQLite via DialectInsert union. Ensure `security.py` uses SHA-256 token hash + generate. Add daily_rollups.total_tokens+provenance columns (amended migration+ORM). Store cost_usd as NULL pending cost engine. Update docs in `docs/api/ingest.md`. Ensure 91 tests pass, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean, and no warnings.
tasks.testStrategy: Test idempotent ingest with duplicate batches. Verify upsert keeps max usage. Confirm sanity validation rejects garbage. Run pytest with coverage >= 80%. Validate ruff/mypy strict/trivy zero issues and no warnings.

tasks.title: Cost Engine and Unknown Model Handling
tasks.description: Implement the cost engine to compute cost_usd at ingest using the provider's PricingStrategy and date-effective pricing row. Handle unknown models (null cost, trigger alert) and add recompute command for history repricing.
tasks.details: Cost engine + unknown model handling implemented: `services/cost.py` (CostEngine resolves price by provider/model/date, delegates to PricingStrategy, returns None for unknown model/provider and records the pair + logs), `services/pricing_repo.py` (seed_default_pricing idempotent, load_pricing_table DB->PricingTable, upsert_price_rows, recompute_costs with only_missing), `services/litellm_sync.py` (fetch_litellm_prices via httpx mockable + sync_anthropic_pricing), `providers.py` (build_registry), `db/upsert.py` pricing_upsert. Wired CostEngine.cost as ingest cost_fn in app lifespan (seeds+loads at startup; create_app cost_fn param still overrides for tests). Known models now priced at ingest, unknown stored null. Docs updated docs/architecture/pricing.md. Gates: 104 tests, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean. Add CLI command `reprice-history` to recompute costs when pricing table changes. Add unit tests for cost calculation and unknown model handling.
tasks.testStrategy: Test cost computation for known and unknown models. Verify alert trigger for unknown models. Confirm reprice-history command updates history. Run pytest with coverage >= 80%. Validate ruff/mypy strict/trivy zero issues.

tasks.title: Daily Rollups Refresh on Ingest
tasks.description: Implement daily rollups refresh on ingest for fast history queries. Create the daily_rollups table update logic triggered after ingest/events.
tasks.details: Create `apps/server/tokemetry_server/services/rollups.py`. Implement `refresh_rollups_for_days` to recompute affected days from `usage_events` grouped by `(provider, coalesce(machine,''), model, coalesce(project,''))` using a portable ts-range filter (no dialect date() fn). Upsert results into `daily_rollups` with `provenance='derived'`. Wire into `IngestService.ingest_events` where `affected_days` are derived from deduped events. Rename `bootstrap_rollups_upsert` to `daily_rollups_upsert` (shared by bootstrap + derived). Whole-day recompute is correct under keep-max and idempotent on re-ingest. Add unit tests for rollup aggregation.
tasks.testStrategy: Test rollup aggregation with sample data. Verify daily_rollups table updates correctly with `provenance='derived'`. Run pytest with coverage >= 80% (actual: 108 tests). Validate ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean. Confirm rollup created, split by grain, reflects keep-max update (not sum), idempotent on reingest, cost aggregated.

tasks.title: Collector Daemon with Offset-Tracked Tailing
tasks.description: Implement the collector daemon (apps/collector) as a cross-platform Python daemon running as Windows Scheduled Task, systemd unit, or launchd agent. Add source-plugin host with watchdog file events and periodic rescan for incremental, byte-offset-tracked tailing.
tasks.details: Implemented collector daemon (Task 8): config.py (TOML via tomllib+pydantic, per-source enable flags, extra=allow for source opts), state.py (SQLite: file_offsets, upload_queue, meta; crash/offline-safe), uploader.py (httpx.Client POST to ingest endpoints, network errors -> False not raised), wire.py (core->wire JSON serializers, machine per-batch), runner.py (Collector.collect_once: tail sources with offset tracking + truncation reset + batch chunking, poll limits with graceful degradation, drain queue oldest-first stopping on failure; run() daemon loop with separate limits cadence + injectable clock; run_bootstrap idempotent via meta flag; dry_run changes nothing), sources.py (provider-agnostic builder registry, filled by Task 9/10), cli.py (--config/--once/--dry-run/--bootstrap, signal-based stop). Runner tested against FakeUsageSource/FakeLimitsSource + httpx MockTransport fake server: offset advance/resume, offline requeue+recovery, truncation reparse, chunking, limits degrade, bootstrap once. Docs: docs/collector/overview.md + deploy/collector.example.toml. Gates: 136 tests, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean.
tasks.testStrategy: Test file event detection and incremental tailing. Verify offset persistence in SQLite. Confirm operational modes work. Run pytest with coverage >= 80%. Validate ruff/mypy strict zero issues. Gates: 136 tests, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean.

tasks.title: AnthropicOAuthLimitsSource Poller with Graceful Degradation
tasks.description: Implement the AnthropicOAuthLimitsSource poller to poll the undocumented endpoint GET https://api.anthropic.com/api/oauth/usage with OAuth token from ~/.claude/.credentials.json. Add graceful degradation to local estimates on failure.
tasks.details: AnthropicOAuthLimitsSource is implemented (collector-side to keep core httpx-free). Reads OAuth token from ~/.claude/.credentials.json using defensive recursive accessToken search. GET /api/oauth/usage with Bearer + `anthropic-beta: oauth-2025-04-20` + Claude-Code UA. Maps five_hour/seven_day/seven_day_opus/seven_day_sonnet windows to normalized LimitSnapshots (provenance=official, resets_at parses ISO or epoch). Skips null windows. Token never leaves machine. All failure modes (missing token, network, non-2xx, bad body) -> LimitsUnavailableError for graceful degradation. Registered `anthropic_oauth` limits builder in sources.py. Tests: token read variations, window mapping, epoch reset, all error->unavailable paths, builder registration. Docs updated. Gates: 148 tests, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean.
tasks.testStrategy: Test poll success with valid OAuth token. Verify graceful degradation to local estimates on failure. Confirm provenance tagging. Run pytest with coverage >= 80%. Validate ruff/mypy strict/trivy zero issues. (Actual: 148 tests pass, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean).

tasks.title: Analytics Engines and Query API Implementation
tasks.description: Implement analytics engines: Block engine (reconstruct 5-hour billing blocks anchored to official resets_at, inferred fallback), Burn-rate engine (tokens per minute over trailing window, predicted exhaustion time), and Query API endpoints with grouping/filtering.
tasks.details: Implemented analytics engines + query API + tokens + WebSocket (Task 11): services/analytics.py (current_limits latest-per-window, limits_history, token_burn_rate tokens/min trailing window, predict_exhaustion via official utilization slope extrapolation, blocks reconstruction anchored to five_hour resets_at with peak-per-minute burn + end utilization), services/queries.py (usage_grouped day/provider/model/machine/project from rollups + session from events, list_sessions, list_machines, punch_card, total_cost, list_pricing), services/tokens.py (create/list/revoke, hashed, plaintext once), services/broadcast.py (in-process pub/sub, drops slow subscribers). Routers: api/query.py (summary/now, limits/current+history, blocks, usage, sessions, machines, heatmap, cost with value-multiple, pricing), api/tokens.py (POST/GET/DELETE), api/stream.py (WS auth via ?token, forwards broadcaster msgs). Ingest routes publish live events. Added subscription_monthly_usd setting. Tests: analytics (burn/prediction slope/blocks anchor+peak), queries (all group-bys, sessions, machines, punch card, cost, pricing), query API HTTP (auth, all endpoints, clock-relative seeds), tokens lifecycle (mint/use/list/dup409/revoke/reject), WS reject + live delivery. Docs: docs/api/query.md. Gates: 176 tests, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean.
tasks.testStrategy: Test block reconstruction with official and inferred resets. Verify burn-rate calculation and prediction. Confirm query endpoints return correct grouped/filter data. Run pytest with coverage >= 80%. Validate ruff/mypy strict zero issues. Gates: 176 tests, ruff/mypy strict/trivy clean.

tasks.title: Vue 3 Web Dashboard with All Views
tasks.description: Implement the Vue 3 web dashboard (apps/dashboard) with Vite scaffold, theming, and API client. Build Now view (gauges, burn rate, live feed), then Trends, Blocks, Breakdowns, Sessions, Machines, Alerts/Settings views.
tasks.details: Created `apps/dashboard` with Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite + ECharts (Task 12): Vite SPA with 7 lazy-loaded views. Views implemented: Now (live limit gauges for 5h/weekly/weekly-Opus + burn rate sparkline + prediction + today-by-model + WS activity feed), Trends (daily stacked area with dimension toggle), Blocks (5h timeline + table), Breakdowns (model/machine/project shares + cache efficiency), Sessions (sortable table), Machines (fleet health + staleness warnings), Settings (theme + token CRUD + pricing overrides). Typed ApiClient implemented in `src/api/client.ts` covering all query endpoints + token management (tested). Format helpers implemented (tested). Validated dataviz categorical palette (fixed order, status+label never color-alone, light/dark selected steps). theme.css role tokens, EChart wrapper, token gate with localStorage, WS live stream. Tooling: vue-tsc --noEmit typecheck, vite build, vitest (16 tests), eslint flat + prettier (clean). echarts bumped to 6 (fixes prod moderate). trivy on package-lock: 0 HIGH/CRITICAL (remaining npm-audit items are dev-only Vite/Vitest tooling, not in shipped static build). Verified live: server endpoints (health/summary/pricing) respond with correct shapes. Docs: apps/dashboard/README.md. Gates: build+16 tests+lint clean, trivy clean.
tasks.testStrategy: Test all views with mock API data. Verify WebSocket live feed. Confirm theme switching. Run vitest with coverage >= 80% (actual: 16 tests passed). Validate ESLint/Prettier clean. Verify trivy clean.

tasks.title: Alerting Rule Engine and Notification Channels
tasks.description: Implement the alerting rule engine evaluated on ingest and timer. Add notification channels (ntfy, Telegram, SMTP) with per-rule routing, cooldown windows, and quiet hours. Create alert configuration API and UI wiring.
tasks.details: Create `apps/server/tokemetry_server/services/alerting.py`. Implement rule engine: 5-hour block at 80%/95%, weekly cap at 80%, predicted exhaustion before reset, burn-rate anomaly (>2x median), collector stale >30min, unknown model. Add notification channels: ntfy (primary), Telegram bot, SMTP email. Implement per-rule channel routing, cooldown windows, quiet hours. Create API endpoints: GET/PUT /alerts, GET /alerts/events. Wire UI in dashboard Alerts view. Add unit tests for rule evaluation and notification.
tasks.testStrategy: Test rule evaluation with sample data. Verify notification routing and cooldown. Confirm API endpoints work. Run pytest with coverage >= 80%. Validate ruff/mypy strict zero issues.

tasks.title: Deployment Packaging and Operations Documentation
tasks.description: Implement deployment and packaging: Docker Compose for VPS (server + Postgres bound to WireGuard), nightly pg_dump backup, collector service wrappers (Windows/systemd/launchd), and operations documentation (server install, collector enrollment, API token provisioning, Grafana datasource guide).
tasks.details: Create `docker-compose.yml` for VPS: server app + Postgres, bound to WireGuard interface only. Add nightly `pg_dump` backup script. Create collector service wrappers: Windows Scheduled Task XML, systemd unit, launchd plist with installation docs. Write operations documentation: server install guide, collector enrollment (per machine), API token provisioning for third-party apps, Grafana datasource how-to. Add deployment tests with docker-compose.
tasks.testStrategy: Test Docker Compose deployment with WireGuard. Verify nightly pg_dump backup. Confirm service wrappers install correctly. Validate documentation completeness. Run deployment tests with docker-compose.
